STDASSERT test suite skeleton.description: Skeleton for an m-stdlib test suite that drives STDASSERT. Drops in the start/report scaffolding, one example test label, and the @TEST runner annotation that m-cli's `m test` uses to discover individual test labels.

STDFIX `with` — transactional scope wrap.description: Run a block of M code inside a YDB transaction that rolls back on exit (or on any error). Pattern: caller passes a scope tag (recorded in the stack for diagnostics) and a string of M commands. The `with` helper opens TSTART, XECUTEs the code, then TROLLBACKs exactly the level it opened — outer transactions are preserved.

STDLOG kv line — structured logger.description: Emit one structured log line with the key=value protocol m-stdlib's STDLOG uses. Up to 5 (k,v) pairs after the event name; the line is prefixed with an ISO-8601 UTC timestamp and the level name. Use INFO / DEBUG / WARN / ERROR / FATAL to pick the level.

STDJSON parse-then-walk.description: Parse a JSON document into a caller-owned tree, then walk the root if it's an array. Handles parse failure cleanly: $$lastError^STDJSON returns the line:col diagnostic; the partial tree is killed by parse() before this code runs. Storage convention: each JSON value occupies one M-tree node with a sigil prefix (s:string, n:number, o object, a array, t/f/z literals).
